Clothing Manufacturer for USA Brands: Why Pakistan Is the Smart Choice in 2026

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 11 min read
Home / Blog / Clothing Manufacturer for USA Brands: Why Pakistan Is the Smart Choice in 2026

The United States is the world's largest market for custom branded apparel. American clothing startups, gym wear brands, streetwear labels, and sports teams increasingly look overseas for manufacturing — but choosing the right country and factory is critical. At FABRIOZA, we've helped 100+ US-based brands launch and scale with factory-direct manufacturing from Pakistan.

Domestic US Manufacturing vs Overseas — Honest Comparison

US Manufacturing Pros: Faster samples (1-2 weeks), easier communication, no import complexity.

US Manufacturing Cons: 3-5x higher per-unit cost ($25-50/hour labor vs $1-2/hour), higher MOQs for quality factories, limited customization options.

Pakistan Pros: 15-30% lower landed cost, ISO 9001 certified quality at 50-piece MOQ, full customization, DDP shipping.

Pakistan Cons: Longer shipping (25-35 days sea vs 1 week domestic).

For most brands ordering 50-500 units, Pakistan wins on cost and quality.

Why Pakistan for US Brands Specifically

  • Factory-direct pricing: No agent or sourcing company markup
  • ISO 9001 certification: Same quality standard as premium US manufacturers
  • 50pcs MOQ: Perfect for DTC startup brands testing demand
  • DDP shipping: Delivered to any US ZIP code with all duties paid

Shipping From Pakistan to USA

  • Sea freight: 25-35 days to East Coast, 30-40 days to West Coast
  • Air freight: 5-7 days
  • Cost: Approximately $0.80-1.50 per hoodie via sea at 100 units

US Import Duties on Clothing From Pakistan

Standard HTS codes for apparel carry 12-32% duty depending on garment type. With DDP shipping, FABRIOZA quotes one final price inclusive of all duties — no surprises.

How FABRIOZA Serves US Brands

24-hour email response, US-compliant care labels, DDP shipping, ISO 9001 quality, private label from 50 pieces. Payment via wire transfer, PayPal (small orders), and Alibaba Trade Assurance.

US Brand Success Stories

We've helped brands from Los Angeles streetwear startups to Texas gym wear labels launch and scale. One LA-based streetwear brand started with 50 pieces and now orders 1,000+ units quarterly across 8 SKUs.

US Brands: Get a Full DDP Quote From FABRIOZA

One price, delivered to your door. ISO 9001 certified. MOQ from 50 pieces.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does shipping from Pakistan to USA take?

Air: 5-7 days. Sea: 25-35 days to East Coast, 30-40 days to West Coast.

Do I pay import duties on clothing from Pakistan?

Yes, typically 12-32% depending on garment type. DDP shipping includes all duties in your quoted price.

How do I pay a Pakistani manufacturer safely?

Wire transfer (T/T), PayPal for small orders, or Alibaba Trade Assurance. Standard terms: 30-50% deposit, balance before shipping.

What if there's a quality issue?

Our ISO 9001 QC process ensures quality before shipment. If issues occur, we work with you on replacement or credit.

Is DDP shipping available to US addresses?

Yes, we offer DDP to all US addresses including Hawaii and Alaska.
